mapper.sql: pb.id, pb.plan_id, pb.barrier_gate_id, pb.plan_community_id, pb.release_date_begin, pb.release_date_end, pb.release_status, pb.created_at, pb.updated_at
mapper.select: SELECT , p.plan_no, p.plan_name, p.customer, bg.gate_no, bg.device_no, bg.door_location FROM plan_barrier pb LEFT JOIN plan p ON pb.plan_id = p.id LEFT JOIN barrier_gate bg ON pb.barrier_gate_id = bg.id WHERE pb.id = #{id}

SELECT , p.plan_no, p.plan_name, p.customer, bg.gate_no, bg.device_no, bg.door_location, pc.community_id, c.community_no, c.building_name FROM plan_barrier pb LEFT JOIN plan p ON pb.plan_id = p.id LEFT JOIN barrier_gate bg ON pb.barrier_gate_id = bg.id LEFT JOIN plan_community pc ON pb.plan_community_id = pc.id LEFT JOIN community c ON pc.community_id = c.id ORDER BY pb.id DESC

SELECT , p.plan_no, p.plan_name, p.customer, bg.gate_no, bg.device_no, bg.door_location, pc.community_id, c.community_no, c.building_name FROM plan_barrier pb LEFT JOIN plan p ON pb.plan_id = p.id LEFT JOIN barrier_gate bg ON pb.barrier_gate_id = bg.id LEFT JOIN plan_community pc ON pb.plan_community_id = pc.id LEFT JOIN community c ON pc.community_id = c.id WHERE pb.plan_id = #{planId} ORDER BY pb.id DESC

SELECT , p.plan_no, p.plan_name, p.customer, bg.gate_no, bg.device_no, bg.door_location FROM plan_barrier pb LEFT JOIN plan p ON pb.plan_id = p.id LEFT JOIN barrier_gate bg ON pb.barrier_gate_id = bg.id WHERE pb.barrier_gate_id = #{barrierGateId} ORDER BY pb.id DESC

SELECT , p.plan_no, p.plan_name, p.customer, bg.gate_no, bg.device_no, bg.door_location, pc.community_id, c.community_no, c.building_name FROM plan_barrier pb LEFT JOIN plan p ON pb.plan_id = p.id LEFT JOIN barrier_gate bg ON pb.barrier_gate_id = bg.id LEFT JOIN plan_community pc ON pb.plan_community_id = pc.id LEFT JOIN community c ON pc.community_id = c.id WHERE pb.plan_community_id = #{planCommunityId} ORDER BY pb.id DESC

SELECT , p.plan_no, p.plan_name, p.customer, bg.gate_no, bg.device_no, bg.door_location FROM plan_barrier pb LEFT JOIN plan p ON pb.plan_id = p.id LEFT JOIN barrier_gate bg ON pb.barrier_gate_id = bg.id WHERE pb.release_status = #{releaseStatus} ORDER BY pb.id DESC
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO plan_barrier ( plan_id, barrier_gate_id, plan_community_id, release_date_begin, release_date_end, release_status ) VALUES
(#{item.planId}, #{item.barrierGateId}, #{item.planCommunityId}, #{item.releaseDateBegin}, #{item.releaseDateEnd}, #{item.releaseStatus})
mapper.delete:
DELETE FROM plan_barrier WHERE id IN
#{id}
